# Task: OpenAI-compatible chat client + health probe (core::explore::client)

> Task ID: GROVE-S02-T02
> Sprint: [GROVE-S02](../INDEX.md)
> Status: 📝 draft
> Estimate: M

## Description

ChatClient trait + OpenAiCompatClient over ureq/rustls speaking chat-completions with tool calls (non-streaming) against Ollama (default) and llama.cpp base URLs. health_probe() verifies endpoint + model availability with typed errors distinguishing unreachable vs model-missing. Provider dialect quirks isolated in this module. Tests to the error-before-connect boundary (no HTTP mocks) plus request/response serde round-trips.
